subcodes.first_line: The dewdrops of divine revelation have trickled down from the leaves of the divine Lote-Tree in the form of these words: O handmaid of God, thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رشحات وحی از اوراق سدره منتهی بصورت این کلمات ترشح نموده ای امه الله کتابت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
